'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=4pLokx._rEbZ8gNcocbXM_1TeYv7k90YVOZ1a1cS5o4-1773704165-1.0.1.1-cKdKi2mheoP.RphbgANib6Vyl12TEhEJAT9H3cAL_bc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
